scripts.dev: sh -c 'python3 -m http.server 8787 --bind 127.0.0.1 & pid=$!; trap "kill $pid" INT TERM EXIT; sleep 0.6; open http://127.0.0.1:8787/ >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; wait $pid'
scripts.pages:check:
python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
required = ['index.html', 'audience_visualizer.html', 'audience_02.md', '.github/workflows/pages.yml']
missing = [p for p in required if not Path(p).exists()]
if missing:
    raise SystemExit('Missing files: ' + ', '.join(missing))
print('GitHub Pages workflow bundle OK')
PY
